# Support

For normal open-source questions, use this repository's issues.

For a focused paid setup review of Arch/Linux GUI workflows under WSL:

- Review page: https://x2.brucelu.top/wsl/?source=github-support-wsl-archlinux-gui
- Sample review: https://x2.brucelu.top/wsl/sample/?source=github-support-wsl-archlinux-gui
- Ask first: https://x2.brucelu.top/products/contact/?offer=wsl&source=github-support-wsl-archlinux-gui
- Checkout: https://x2.brucelu.top/wsl/checkout/?source=github-support-wsl-archlinux-gui

Do not post secrets, Windows account data, private paths, camera/API keys, or proprietary logs in public issues.
